name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Windows)
notes: This rule detects admin privileges added to standard users. An adversary may escalate its privileges for further attacks.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Added
when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of Administrators
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Added
AND when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of Administrators
